questions.question: Explain the convolution operation in digital image processing with a simple example.
Compare and contrast box filter and Gaussian filter for image smoothing.
Describe three different padding strategies used in convolution and explain the advantages and disadvantages of each.
Explain the concept of separable filters and demonstrate how they reduce computational complexity with an example.
Discuss the applications of linear filtering in computer vision, providing specific examples for different filter types.
expectedPoints: Specific filter examples for each application

questions.question: Explain the convolution theorem and its significance in frequency domain filtering.
expectedPoints: Relationship between spatial and frequency domains
